evals.prompt: Erstelle ein Angebot für Müller Heizungsbau GmbH (Stefan Müller, s.mueller@mueller-heizung.de, +49 171 5551234). Die haben 5 Mitarbeiter und brauchen eine komplette Digitalisierung: Kundenverwaltung, automatische Angebotserstellung, E-Mail-Automatisierung und Mahnwesen. Professional Tier.
evals.expected_output: Complete Angebot object with all required fields, Professional tier pricing, correct positionen, Kleinunternehmer notice, 30-day validity.

assertions.name: has-angebot-id
assertions.description: Output contains an Angebot ID starting with ANG-

assertions.name: customer-name-correct
assertions.description: Contains 'Müller' or 'Mueller' as kunde_name

assertions.name: customer-email-correct
assertions.description: Contains 's.mueller@mueller-heizung.de'

assertions.name: has-erstgespraech-free
assertions.description: First position is Erstgespräch/Betriebsanalyse at €0 or 0 EUR

assertions.name: has-professional-setup
assertions.description: Contains a Professional-Setup or vollständige Geschäftssuite position

assertions.name: has-email-automation
assertions.description: Contains E-Mail-Automatisierung position

assertions.name: has-mahnwesen
assertions.description: Contains Mahnwesen position

assertions.name: has-retainer
assertions.description: Contains monthly retainer position (Monat unit, €400 range)

assertions.name: kleinunternehmer-notice
assertions.description: Contains §19 UStG Kleinunternehmer reference

assertions.name: mwst-zero
assertions.description: MwSt/VAT is 0 or explicitly stated as not charged

assertions.name: validity-30-days
assertions.description: Contains 30 Tage or gueltig_bis date ~30 days out

assertions.name: professional-price-range
assertions.description: Total netto is between 4500 and 7000 EUR (Professional range)

assertions.name: german-language
assertions.description: All position descriptions and text are in German

assertions.name: status-entwurf
assertions.description: Status is 'entwurf' (draft, not yet sent)

evals.prompt: Florian Buchert ist mein Pilotprojekt-Kunde (Freund, €0). Erstelle ein vollständiges Angebot mit allen Professional-Positionen aber alles auf 0€. Er soll trotzdem den ganzen Prozess durchlaufen.
evals.expected_output: Complete Angebot with all positions listed but priced at €0, pilot/friend template text, full workflow preserved.

assertions.name: customer-buchert
assertions.description: Contains 'Florian Buchert' or 'Buchert' as customer

assertions.name: all-prices-zero
assertions.description: All einzelpreis values are 0 or total is 0 EUR

assertions.name: positions-listed
assertions.description: Contains at least 5 position descriptions (full scope, not empty)

assertions.name: has-erstgespraech
assertions.description: Contains Erstgespräch position

assertions.name: pilot-acknowledged
assertions.description: Text acknowledges pilot/Pilotprojekt or kostenlos or friend

assertions.name: kleinunternehmer-notice
assertions.description: Contains §19 UStG reference even at €0

assertions.name: retainer-included
assertions.description: Contains retainer/Support position even at €0

assertions.name: total-zero
assertions.description: Netto and brutto total is 0 or 0,00

evals.prompt: Ich brauche 3 Angebotsvarianten für Weber Elektrotechnik (Thomas Weber, weber@weber-elektro.de). 3 Mitarbeiter, will erstmal klein anfangen. Erstelle Budget, Standard und Premium Varianten.
evals.expected_output: Three quote variants (Budget/Standard/Premium) with different scope and pricing, comparison format.

assertions.name: three-variants
assertions.description: Contains 3 distinct variants: Budget/Sparpaket AND Standard/Empfohlen AND Premium/Komplettpaket

assertions.name: budget-cheapest
assertions.description: Budget variant total is lower than Standard and Premium

assertions.name: premium-most-expensive
assertions.description: Premium variant has highest total

assertions.name: standard-recommended
assertions.description: Standard variant is marked as recommended/empfohlen

assertions.name: customer-weber
assertions.description: Contains 'Weber' as customer name

assertions.name: kleinunternehmer-all
assertions.description: All variants mention §19 UStG or zero MwSt

assertions.name: starter-range
assertions.description: At least one variant is in Starter range (€3,000-4,500)

assertions.name: each-has-positions
assertions.description: Each variant has its own list of positions/Positionen
